ResearchTabDef.label: Neolithic
ResearchTabDef.generalDescription: Unlock technologies related to the Neolithic Age.

ResearchTabDef.label: Medieval
ResearchTabDef.generalDescription: Unlock technologies related to the Medieval Age.

ResearchTabDef.label: Early Industrial
ResearchTabDef.generalDescription: Unlock technologies related to the Industrial Age.

ResearchTabDef.label: Late Industrial
ResearchTabDef.generalDescription: Unlock technologies related to the Late Industrial Age, that require a Multi-analyzer

ResearchTabDef.label: Spacer
ResearchTabDef.generalDescription: Unlock technologies related to the Spacer Age.

ResearchTabDef.label: Ultra
ResearchTabDef.generalDescription: Unlock technologies related to the Ultra Age.

ResearchTabDef.label: Archotech
ResearchTabDef.generalDescription: Unlock technologies related to the Archotech Age.
